channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 12 actually useful desk upgrades that are all under $100 — I review work gear for a living, and these practical gadgets are more than just office eye-candy
item.description: This is the actually useful desk gear I recommend for the home, office, or dorm room.

item.title: Uber’s $14.8B Delivery Hero deal would nearly double its global footprint
item.description: Uber has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal that would nearly double the company’s global footprint and create one of the world’s largest food delivery platforms outside China.

item.title: Ce serait une première chez Apple : un iPad mini avec écran OLED arriverait dès cet automne
item.description: Apple s'apprêterait à intégrer un écran OLED dans son futur iPad mini. Ce serait une première pour la petite tablette, dont le lancement pourrait avoir lieu dès cet automne.

item.title: Zero trust must now move at agent speed
item.description: Presented by Ping Identity Enterprises need to treat zero trust security architecture as an immediate requirement for AI agents rather than a long-term goal, says Andre Durand, CEO and founder of Ping Identity. Zero trust, the security model built on the assumption that no user, device, or system should be automatically trusted, requires continuous verification before every action rather than a single check at login. Agentic AI has profoundly compressed the risk timeline enterprises must manage, demanding that permission decisions be evaluated in real time.type: embedded-entry-inline id: 1Ieiy...

item.title: The AI context gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a trust problem, not a retrieval problem — and most are still building the fix
item.description: Across 101 enterprises, the infrastructure that feeds AI agents their business context is being built faster than it can be trusted. Retrieval-augmented generation is already the default context source, and provider-native retrieval has quietly overtaken the dedicated vector databases that define the category — yet a majority of enterprises have already watched their agents produce confident, wrong answers traced to missing or inconsistent context. A governed semantic layer is emerging as the fix, but most are still building it; the field is converging on hybrid retrieval; and even as provider...

item.title: Microsoft nemesis returns with another zero-day PoC — but is 'LegacyHive' as nasty as expected?
item.description: Chaotic Eclipse is back with a new Windows 11 zero-day called LegacyHive.

item.title: Xpeng L03 électrique : pourquoi la France est privée de sa version record à 1 000 km à prolongateur d’autonomie
item.description: Xpeng lance son SUV coupé électrique L03 en France à partir de 34 990 euros. Mais la version à prolongateur d'autonomie, celle qui vise les 1 000 km, restera à la frontière : en cause, le malus.

item.title: Newsletter platform Beehiiv’s now lets subscribers chat with each other, adds AI
item.description: Beehiiv is launching an AI Copilot to help publishers with user growth and analytics

item.title: Google is better at playing the EU regulations game
item.description: Today, the European Union ordered Google to give its AI rivals greater access to Android, the open-source operating system that powers billions of devices worldwide. The demand is hardly surprising. It may look like a defeat on paper for Google, which has spent years resisting exactly this kind of access, but it is a regulatory […]

item.title: TobenONE UDS060 review: This compact 11-in-1 USB-C dock is one of the smallest I've ever tested
item.description: TobenONE UDS060 11-in-1 USB-C Docking Station is a basic USB Dock, but also a customizable controller.

item.title: Roblox will let people use AI to make games on their phone
item.description: Roblox is about to let people make games with AI right inside its mobile app, which could make a platform that's already filled with content of questionable quality feel even more overloaded. The company has embraced AI with open arms, including a preview of an ambitious take on AI world models similar to Google's Project […]

item.title: ‘It wasn't a decision made in a rush’: OnePlus explains why it’s just quit the US and Europe — and answers our 5 biggest questions about what it means
item.description: OnePlus is officially quitting the US and Europe, but what exactly does that mean for current users and the future? We asked OnePlus and Oppo to find out.

item.title: 47 requests, zero answers — How Proton VPN keeps saying no to data demands
item.description: Proton VPN's updated transparency report shows 47 data requests in the first half of 2026. These were all rejected because its audited no-logs policy leaves nothing to hand over.

item.title: The agent evaluation gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a reality-alignment problem, not a coverage problem — and most are shipping to production anyway
item.description: Across 157 enterprises, organizations are granting AI agents more autonomy while trusting the evaluations meant to gate that autonomy less. Half have already shipped an agent that passed their internal evaluations and then failed a customer in production; only one in twenty fully trusts automated evaluation today; and the most-cited weakness is that evaluations do not align with real-world outcomes. Yet two-thirds already allow, or are actively engineering toward, deploying agent changes to production on automated evaluation alone — with no human in the loop. The result is an evaluation gap — ...

item.title: X cracks down on creators who steal content
item.description: X will use Grok AI to better detect stolen content, redirect payouts to original creators, and crack down on engagement bait.

item.title: Pourquoi ce laptop gamer Asus sous RTX 5070 et Core 7 avec 550 € de moins est la meilleure affaire de cette fin de soldes ?
item.description: L'Asus Gaming V16 (V3607) associe un processeur Intel Core 7 240H et une carte graphique RTX 5070 dans un châssis de 1,95 kg. Ce laptop gamer 16 pouces passe de 1999 euros à 1449 euros directement sur la boutique Asus, soit 550 euros de remise.

item.title: Pour défier Tesla et Ionity, Xpeng va lancer des bornes de recharge record à 1 000 kW en Europe cette année
item.description: Xpeng ne veut plus dépendre uniquement des opérateurs tiers pour recharger ses voitures en Europe : le constructeur chinois va y installer son propre réseau de bornes ultra-rapides, annoncées jusqu'à 1 000 kW.

item.title: Former PlayStation boss says Sony needs 'more games for more people' to justify a $1,000 PS6
item.description: Former PlayStation boss Shawn Layden thinks studios need to start investing in unique games that entice a wider audience to justify the cost of next-gen.

item.title: Google AI Mode now integrates with Canva, YouTube Music and Instacart
item.description: You can now make playlists, design flyers and compile shopping lists using AI in Search.

item.title: Seagate IronWolf Pro and WD Red Pro NAS drives are all discounted — here's why I'd buy the most expensive model
item.description: Seagate and WD NAS drives are all on sale, but one surprising choice offers by far the best long-term value.

item.title: An OLED iPad mini could finally arrive this year
item.description: Apple will reportedly refresh the iPad mini this fall and the rest of its iPad lineup in the first half of 2027.

item.title: $100 billion will go to U.S. chip manufacturing in TSMC’s latest pledge
item.description: This latest investment seems to bring TSMC’s total pledges for U.S. chipmaking to $265 billion. Major Taiwan computer chipmaker TSMC said Thursday it plans to spend another $100 billion on expanding its manufacturing capacity in the United States.The latest commitment appears to bring the company’s total pledges for investment in U.S. chipmaking to $265 billion. It also raised its annual revenue forecast after booking record high profits thanks to runaway demand from the boom in artificial intelligence.The world’s largest contract chip manufacturing and one of the world’s most valuable compani...

item.title: AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
item.description: Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion.

item.title: Russian hacker turns Gemini CLI into a hacking agent, creates small-scale botnet
item.description: The hacker told the AI he was an authorized pentester - and the AI believed him.

item.title: Les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin : voici les ultimes offres de la dernière démarque
item.description: Les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin : c’est l’ultime occasion de faire de bonnes affaires avant la fin ! Il vous reste moins d'une semaine pour en profiter et renouveler votre équipement (smartphones, TV, PC portables, tablettes, objets connectés…). On continue de faire le tri pour vous proposer en temps réel les meilleures pépites Tech que l'on voit passer. ...

item.title: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
item.description: Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search. Google first revealed Gemini Notebook - then called Project Tailwind - in May 2023 before widely releasing […]

item.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
item.description: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.

item.title: Google continues its renaming streak by turning NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
item.description: Google said users can soon access their notebooks through AI Mode in Search.

item.title: Mike Flanagan's Carrie series has a first look — and the Prime Video horror series has the potential to be the best adaptation of the book yet
item.description: Mike Flanagan has become the king of horror TV shows, and I'm definitely feeling confident about his adaptation of Stephen King's Carrie.

item.title: Google's NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook
item.description: Google already baked NotebookLM into Gemini, now it's changing the name to reflect the tighter integration

item.title: Satya Nadella makes the case for AI independence
item.description: The Microsoft CEO argues that businesses should control more of the data, models, and infrastructure that make AI useful. Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter breaking down the most important news in the world of AI. I’m Mark Sullivan, a senior writer at Fast Company covering emerging technology, AI, and tech policy.

item.title: Soldes d’été : Amazon a gardé le meilleur pour la fin avec ces ultimes promos Tech
item.description: Les soldes d’été touchent à leur fin dans quelques jours, mais Amazon a gardé ses meilleures cartouches pour la dernière ligne droite. Le géant du e-commerce vide ses stocks et multiplie les offres sur la Tech : voici notre sélection des meilleures offres à saisir avant qu'il ne soit trop tard.

item.title: Comparatif autonomie : quel casque Bluetooth avec une bonne batterie choisir en 2026 ?
item.description: Vous recherchez avant tout une excellente autonomie pour votre futur casque audio sans fil ? La rédaction de Frandroid a sélectionné pour vous les modèles les plus endurants, avec ou sans réduction active de bruit.

item.title: Support de téléphone pour vélo : notre sélection des meilleurs modèles
item.description: Vous avez besoin d'utiliser votre téléphone à vélo ? Il vous faut donc un bon support dédié, fiable et simple à fixer. C'est pour vous aider que nous avons rassemblé les meilleurs supports de smartphones pour vélo selon nous.

item.title: The Google Pixel 11 will be available to preorder on August 12 and the brand is already teasing an 'exclusive offer' — here's what we think it is
item.description: It's official: the Google Pixel 11 series will be available to preorder next month — and there's already a rather cryptic deal on offer.

item.title: TV Sony Bravia 7 II avec True RGB Mini LED : l’alternative plus lumineuse à l’OLED est disponible avec des offres chez Boulanger [Sponso]
item.description: Sony vient de dévoiler sa toute nouvelle technologie d'affichage True RGB Mini LED, que l'on retrouve notamment sur le téléviseur Sony Bravia 7 II à partir de 1 999 euros. Découvrez le fonctionnement de cette solide alternative à l'OLED.

item.title: Time’s running out to save $10 on Splatoon Raiders physical preorders
item.description: Splatoon Raiders’ July 23rd launch day is almost here, so your window to preorder the physical version at a $10 discount is about to close. The digital version is $49.99, and so is the game on cartridge if you preorder at Walmart. Amazon previously honored the preorder discount, but it’s selling the game at full […]

item.title: Tesla driver in fatal Texas crash overrode FSD by pressing accelerator ‘100 percent,’ investigators confirm
item.description: The Tesla driver who fatally struck a woman after crashing into her home "manually overrode" the vehicle's Full Self-Driving (FSD) technology by pressing the gas pedal to 100 percent, the National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) confirmed in a preliminary report on Wednesday. After examining the car's electronic data, investigators found that the Tesla Model 3 […]...

item.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
item.description: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.

item.title: Moins de 13 000 € et batterie semi-solide : j’ai conduit le MG 4X, le redoutable héritier de la MG 4 en Chine
item.description: MG revient d’une période de ventes très difficile en Chine pour l'année 2025. Heureusement sa berline compacte électrique MG4 lui a ouvert un nouveau chemin grâce à une tarification agressive. Son nouveau SUV compact électrique, le MG 4X, à batterie liquide-solide à moins de 13 000 € en Chine a maintenant pour vocation de s’imposer sur une catégorie très disputée. On a pu la conduire, voici notre avis. ...

item.title: UK cops say arrest of two young hackers disrupted the operations of an infamous hacking group
item.description: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair, two members of the prolific Scattered Spider hacking group, pleaded guilty and were sentenced to five years and six months in jail for hacking London’s metropolitan transit system.

item.title: La plus populaire des IA musicales a été entraînée sur des millions de titres volés, quelle surprise !
item.description: On savait Suno gourmande en musique d'autrui. Un piratage vient de transformer les soupçons en inventaire détaillé : des millions de titres aspirés sur YouTube, Deezer et Genius pour entraîner l'IA. À quinze jours d'un verdict décisif en Allemagne.

item.title: Swatch’s New Gold MoonSwatch Solves the Problem of the Nightmare Royal Pop Launch
item.description: Swatch’s latest MoonSwatch is the Mission to the Moon 1969, a limited-edition model with components crafted from Omega’s 18K Moonshine Gold. To get one, you'll have to join a lottery.

item.title: Period tracker Stardust shares users’ health data with analytics firm, says Mozilla research
item.description: One period tracker app tested by Mozilla was 'squeaky clean,' while another app was seen sharing users' health data with an analytics company, underscoring vast differences in user privacy among these apps.

item.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
item.description: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.

item.title: Shark upgrades its acclaimed CryoGlow blemish-busting LED face mask – it costs a little more but it delivers better coverage around the crows' feet area and its battery life is better too
item.description: Shark's CryoGlow Plus promises 120% better coverage plus the brand's InstaChill Cold technology to help soothe and de-puff

item.title: This 77-inch Samsung OLED TV is $1,700 cheaper than when it debuted in 2025
item.description: The Samsung 77-inch S85F OLED 4K TV has dropped to a new record-low price of $1,299.99 at Amazon, Best Buy, and Samsung.

item.title: Dragon's Dogma 2 producer says Capcom is improving performance on PS5 and Xbox ahead of Dark Arisen's launch and that the Switch 2 version is 'exceeding' expectations
item.description: Dragon's Dogma 2 will see performance improvements with the arrival of Dark Arisen and the Nintendo Switch 2 version.
